all_features_implemented.details: FR-006 through FR-009 implemented: Enhanced Search sections added to upgrade-engineer, execution-path-tracer, cross-validation-verifier, and roundtable-analyst agent files

unit_test_coverage_80_percent.details: 20 new structural validation tests (TC-U-038 through TC-U-057) covering 100% of requirements. Each agent has 5 tests: section presence, modality content, availability check, existing reference preservation, frontmatter unchanged.

all_tests_passing.details: 39/39 tests passing in search-agent-migration.test.js (20 new + 19 existing). Pre-existing failures in other test files are unrelated to this change.

code_follows_standards.details: Tests use node:test runner, ESM imports, existing helper functions. Agent markdown follows established Enhanced Search section pattern.

type_checking_passes.details: Project uses plain JavaScript and Markdown (no TypeScript)

implementation_matches_design.details: Enhanced Search sections follow exact pattern from REQ-0042 migrated agents (impact-analyzer.md, entry-point-finder.md, quick-scan-agent.md). Each section includes availability check, structural search, lexical search, and fallback guidance.

code_documentation_complete.details: implementation-notes.md created with full traceability matrix. Test file JSDoc updated to reference REQ-0043.

existing_tests_unaffected.details: All 19 existing tests in search-agent-migration.test.js continue to pass. No agent files from REQ-0042 were modified.

articles_validated.evidence: Tests written first (TDD Red: 12 tests failed as expected). Then Enhanced Search sections added (TDD Green: all 39 tests pass). TDD workflow documented in implementation-notes.md.
Enhanced Search sections follow the exact established pattern. No new code modules, no new test helpers, no over-engineering. 4 markdown sections + 20 test cases.

All gate checklist items pass. All 20 new tests pass. Implementation notes artifact created. Gate validation file produced.
